policies.title: Operational Resilience
policies.question: Your organization lacks adequate Operational Resilience controls. No organizational control found to address requirement "ICT Risk Management Framework" What should be your immediate priority?
answers: Implement comprehensive risk assessment procedures with executive oversight
Schedule a meeting to discuss the issue
Document the gap for future consideration
policies.correctAnswer: Implement comprehensive risk assessment procedures with executive oversight
